overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy exploring 'The Greenhouse', a dark, overgrown underground facility. She traverses wooden walkways, ascends stone and metal stairs, wades through water, and approaches a large metal door, with warm torchlight and neon signs illuminating the post-apocalyptic industrial environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with wooden planks and metal roofing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across wooden planks in a covered corridor with warm lantern light

entered.detail: rusted metal roof structure providing partial cover over the walkway
weathered wooden planks forming the path surface
ornate lanterns emitting warm orange light mounted on walls
stone walls covered in dense green ivy and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered corridor with a metal roof overhead, traversing wooden planks. Warm lanterns illuminate the stone walls covered in ivy, creating a cozy yet mysterious atmosphere in the underground facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone pathway ascending through ruins with scattered debris

events.description: text overlay 'THE GREENHOUSE' appears as ground surface changes from wood to stone

agents.ego_description: walking up a gentle stone incline with small steps and scattered wooden debris

entered.detail: uneven stone pathway replacing the wooden planks
rough stone steps leading upward into the ruins
rusted metal barrel sitting beside the path

segments.scene_description: The location text 'THE GREENHOUSE' appears as the character transitions from wooden planks to a stone pathway. The environment becomes more enclosed with stone walls and scattered debris, while lanterns shift to the right side as the path ascends gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal staircase ascending between industrial stone walls

events.description: character begins ascending steep metal stairs with railings

agents.ego_description: climbing a steep metal staircase with industrial railings on the left

entered.detail: rusted metal stairs with grated steps leading upward
greenish metal railings lining the left side of the stairs
large metal pipes running along the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character transitions to a steep metal staircase with grated steps and industrial railings. The environment becomes more industrial with visible pipes along the stone walls, and the vegetation thins out as the ascent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded chamber with large tree and neon DATA CORE sign

events.description: exits stairwell into large open chamber with shallow water and massive tree
green neon DATA CORE sign becomes clearly visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water toward a glowing green neon sign in the distance

entered.detail: shallow water covering the ground with grass patches emerging
massive gnarled tree with extensive roots growing in the chamber
glowing green neon sign reading 'DATA CORE' hanging from the ceiling
tall decorative lamp post with multiple warm lights

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the character enters a vast flooded chamber dominated by a massive ancient tree. The space opens up dramatically with shallow water underfoot, and a glowing green 'DATA CORE' neon sign becomes visible in the distance, contrasting with the warm torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to large metal vault door with stone archway

events.description: character slows down approaching the large metal doorway

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a large metal vault door at the end of the path

entered.detail: mossy grass patches replacing the water as the ground rises
massive circular metal vault door with mechanical details
ornate stone arch framing the entrance to the door

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the water behind, walking on grassy ground toward a massive metal vault door. The neon DATA CORE sign moves closer and clearer as the character slows down, approaching the stone archway that frames the entrance to the next area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy, overgrown corridor that gradually opens into a vast, industrial flooded chamber. It begins with the character traversing wooden planks under a metal roof, where warm lanterns illuminate ivy-covered stone walls. As the path transitions to stone and the location text The Greenhouse appears, the environment becomes more enclosed and debris-strewn before shifting toward a steep metal staircase lined with industrial pipes. The scene then expands dramatically as the character emerges from the stairs into a wide, shallow pool of water dominated by a massive ancient tree and a glowing green Data Core neon sign. Finally, the camera moves from the water onto grassy ground, approaching a massive metal vault door framed by a stone archway.
